top_signals.title: Iran Rushes to Woo Asia’s Largest Oil Importers after US Waiver
top_signals.summary: Iran is racing to court some of Asia’s largest oil buyers as a 60-day US sanctions waiver takes effect, a temporary lifeline that should allow Tehran to resume exports and begin clearing a backlog of cargoes on the water, even as peace talks continue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Slump on Tech Selloff, Oil Edges Lower: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks declined as investors rotated out of some of this year’s best-performing technology shares while awaiting further developments in US-Iran peace talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why a 66-year-old water treaty is becoming the latest India-Pakistan flashpoint
top_signals.summary: India and Pakistan are locked in a dispute over the Indus Water Treaty after New Delhi suspended the pact, raising concerns about regional stability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Russian central bank chief’s absence stirs succession talk  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump signs orders for quantum computer, cryptography upgrades
top_signals.summary: “We’re going to be investing in American quantum leadership like never before to stay ahead of the pack,” says US President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
